_doc: Names that check-edge-fn-schema-refs.mjs must NOT flag even though they are absent from the public schema in frontend/src/types/database.types.ts. Each entry is { name, reason }. Categories: (a) cross-schema objects that legitimately live outside public (auth.*, events.*) — PostgREST/type-gen only emits public, so these can never appear in the types and are correctly exempt; (b) Storage buckets are handled in-code (storage.from), not here; (c) genuinely-absent objects the edge fn references that do NOT exist in any schema on staging (verified via live SQL 2026-06-10) — these are pre-existing dead/aspirational/backlog edge-fn references, tracked in reports/escalated-backlog-master-2026-06-10.md, NOT type-file drift this phase introduced. A real LIVE public object missing from the generated types is DRIFT — regenerate the types, do not allowlist it.
_verification: All 66 entries below were checked against staging (zkrcjzdemdmwhearhfgg) on 2026-06-10: none exist as a public-schema table/view/function. refresh_tokens=auth schema; append_event/create_snapshot/get_aggregate_events/get_aggregate_history/get_correlated_events/get_state_at_time/rebuild_aggregate_state=events schema; check_circular_delegation exists in public but only as a zero-arg signature while the edge fn calls it with args (signature mismatch) — exempted as a backlog fix, not a regen. All others: absent from every schema.
